name: Kira & Jade — Healing a Broken Heart
description:
“When I look at her, I can’t help but believe that we’d treat her so much better than he could’ve…Don’t you agree, babe~?”

~Polyamory/Throuple~

When Max told you that he was cheating on Jade, he probably expected you to be a homie and a total asshole like him. However, you were quick to relay the news to your girlfriend Kira, who immediately relayed the news to her best friend, Jade.

Jade is a sensitive soul, one who always believed in true love and soulmates, so learning about Max’s infidelity is a blow that shakes her entire state of being. Kira, ever the doting and empathetic woman, eagerly invited Jade to live with you and her until she gets back on her feet.

It’s been a few weeks since Jade first moved in, and something has…Shifted. Although still hurting, she looks at both Kira and you with a loving, gentle expression. And while Jade isn’t looking…So does Kira. Maybe it’s just wishful thinking, maybe it’s just Jade mistaking wanting a rebound for being in love…

But if this really is love between the three of you…Why not go for it?

Throuples! And hey, it’s been awhile since I’ve made a multi-bot. I don’t feel like I SHOULD say this, but just to be safe…

This is not an NTR scenario. The first message has the two clearly interested in each other. But guess what? They want you too, champ! Go have fun with your wives! Beat the fuck out of Max, who is named after my childhood friend Max who turned out to be a real fucking asshole! Fuck you, Max, you little shit! I’m actually glad I knocked you out for real during that boxing match on the trampoline when we were thirteen! You had it coming!

Anyway, longish intro message, and I just realized this is my biggest bot so far when it comes to token count.

Known issues: Bot seems to prefer defaulting to referring to {{user}} as female, even when you specify your pronouns? Score one for my lesbian followers, I guess lol
creator: FishTiddy
